chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S-86 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 15.04.2025 Mr. Niaz Hussain Shahani Advocate along with Applicant. Mr. Shahnawaz Bughio Advocate for Respondent No.5. ASI Zahid Hussain Hingoro PS Rukkan. -.-.-. The detenue has shown her appearance before this Court where she has made an statement that she is living in Karachi of her own freewill with her husband Muhammad Rafique. She also states that she has not been detained by anyone and is not living in forced environment. With this statement it is observed that since the alleged detenue is sui juris she is directed to live on her own and is free to go anywhere she is intending to live. In the above terms, this being Application u/s 491 Cr.P.C which is confined to the extent of detention and when there is no detention stated by the detenue the case is not to be further proceeded. In such circumstances, matter stands disposed of. J U D G E Ali Haider
